roles.name: Ranch Patriarch
roles.description: Holds the vision for the whole spread — designs the over-arching solution and protects the legacy.

roles.name: Ranch Foreman
roles.description: Runs the day-to-day on the ground — keeps the crew moving and the timeline honest.

roles.name: Brand Inspector
roles.description: Steward of records, fields, layouts, and permission sets — every brand accounted for.

roles.name: Ranch Hand Smith
roles.description: Forges Apex, LWC, and platform features in the saddle shop.

roles.name: Cattle Baron
roles.description: Rules over all Stateside Salesforce craft — sets standards and guides the senior hands.

roles.name: Trail Boss — Helena
roles.description: Leads the offshore drive — practiced craft on the long road of customer requirements.

roles.name: Drover
roles.description: Rides discovery and configuration across the herd under the Trail Boss's eye.

roles.name: Master of the Bridges
roles.description: Architect of the great spans between Salesforce and the realms beyond — pipelines, callouts, and event grids.

roles.name: Bridge Crew Lead
roles.description: Lays the timber of API, middleware, and event flows under the Master's plan.

roles.name: Bridge Apprentice
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts and the patterns of error handling.

roles.name: Livestock Inspector
roles.description: Walks the pens before market — finds the lameness in the build before it reaches the buyer.

roles.name: Brand Marketer
roles.description: Lifts the Yellowstone brand high — leads all marketing craft from Bozeman to the coasts.

roles.name: Auctioneer
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — sounds the call to gather buyers and convert them at ring side.

roles.name: Rodeo Promoter
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the field — content, creative, and the daily ride.

roles.name: Ranch Bookkeeper
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between the Patriarch and the saddle shop.

roles.name: Senior Ranch Hand Smith
roles.description: Veteran builder — owns the toughest forge work and mentors the apprentices.

roles.name: Greenhorn Drover
roles.description: First saddle on the trail — learns configuration and discovery under the Drover's wing.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every faction starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Bunkhouse Cowboys — Field Crew Mobile Platform
Broken Rock — Tribal Sovereignty Data Platform

dutton-family-ranch.name: Branding Day Kickoff
dutton-family-ranch.description: Discovery sign-off — the herd gets the Y on the hip and the project gets the green light.

dutton-family-ranch.name: Saddle Up the Build
dutton-family-ranch.description: Build kickoff — apprentices in the saddle, smiths at the forge.

dutton-family-ranch.name: Family Dinner Review
dutton-family-ranch.description: Mid-project gate — John convenes the family at the lodge for solution review.

dutton-family-ranch.name: Sale Barn Invoice
dutton-family-ranch.description: Phase invoice trigger: cattle sold, ledger settled.

dutton-family-ranch.name: Heritage Handover
dutton-family-ranch.description: Go-Live: the brand book is digital and the legacy preserved.

dutton-family-ranch.name: Patriarch's Hand-off
dutton-family-ranch.description: Hyper-care close: stewardship passed to the next generation.

bunkhouse-cowboys.name: Bunkhouse Muster
bunkhouse-cowboys.description: Project kickoff: Rip calls the crew off the porch and out to the barn.

bunkhouse-cowboys.name: Ride Out to the Range
bunkhouse-cowboys.description: Build phase: the crew is in the field with the new tooling.

bunkhouse-cowboys.name: Cutting Pen UAT
bunkhouse-cowboys.description: UAT gate: separate the keepers from the culls.

bunkhouse-cowboys.name: Sale Barn Go-Live
bunkhouse-cowboys.description: Go-Live: mobile platform live at the auction ring.

bunkhouse-cowboys.name: Back to the Bunkhouse
bunkhouse-cowboys.description: Hyper-care close: crew off the trail, boots by the door.

bunkhouse-cowboys.name: Trail Drive Final Invoice
bunkhouse-cowboys.description: Final invoice: every head accounted for, every hour billed.

broken-rock-reservation.name: Council Convenes
broken-rock-reservation.description: Discovery: Chairman Rainwater opens the council to begin.

broken-rock-reservation.name: Drum the Build to Life
broken-rock-reservation.description: Build: the sovereignty stack takes shape under tribal oversight.

broken-rock-reservation.name: Chairman's Audit
broken-rock-reservation.description: Solution review with Rainwater and Mo at the council hall.

broken-rock-reservation.name: Sovereignty Go-Live
broken-rock-reservation.description: Go-Live: the platform serves the people, not the parking lot.

broken-rock-reservation.name: Roundhouse Close
broken-rock-reservation.description: Project close: hyper-care wraps with a final ceremony.

broken-rock-reservation.name: Treaty Final Invoice
broken-rock-reservation.description: Final invoice from Broken Rock — every dollar accounted to the council.

market-equities-rivals.name: Boardroom Greenlight
market-equities-rivals.description: Kickoff: Caroline Warner approves the spend over a $14 cup of espresso.

market-equities-rivals.name: Hostile Acquisition Build
market-equities-rivals.description: Discovery: parcel data modelled, hostile strategy drafted.

market-equities-rivals.name: Investor Roadshow
market-equities-rivals.description: Build: the investor portal goes on tour from NYC to LA.

market-equities-rivals.name: Quarterly Earnings Gate
market-equities-rivals.description: UAT acceptance: numbers walked through with Roarke before the call.

market-equities-rivals.name: Resort Ribbon Cutting
market-equities-rivals.description: Go-Live + handoff: the resort opens, champagne for the suits.

market-equities-rivals.name: Final Equity Invoice
market-equities-rivals.description: Final invoice from Market Equities — wired before the close of business.

John Dutton.notes: Doctor's appointment in Bozeman — keeping it quiet from the kids.

Beth Dutton.notes: Confronting an enemy in Salt Lake — personal day.

Kayce Dutton.notes: Vision quest on the reservation with Monica and Tate.

Jamie Dutton.notes: Attorney General campaign event in Helena.

Jimmy Hurdstram.notes: Texas — 6666 Ranch detail; Mia's not happy about it.

Lloyd Pierce.notes: Bar fight recovery — knee acting up again.

Walker.notes: Recording session — laying down a new track.

Thomas Rainwater.notes: Tribal gaming commission hearing in DC.

Angela Blue Thunder.notes: Strategy retreat — not bringing her phone.

Caroline Warner.notes: Park Avenue board meeting — first class only.

Roarke Morris.notes: Fly fishing on the Yellowstone — what could go wrong.
